lines.speaker: Vineyard worker
lines.text: I wish these grapes could pick themselves.

lines.speaker: Vineyard worker
lines.text: The grapes are in good shape for this harvest.

lines.speaker: Vineyard worker
lines.text: I'm sorry, but the vineyards need tending to.

lines.speaker: Vineyard worker
lines.text: Have you tried the wine? You won't regret it if you do!
